india_trends.title: US Stock Market: US treasury keeps auction sizes unchanged, signals stable borrowing strategy
india_trends.summary: The US Treasury will maintain stable auction sizes for notes and bonds for at least the next several quarters, opting for a cautious borrowing approach amid market volatility. This decision, part of the quarterly refunding plan, aims to avoid further pressure on the bond market.

india_trends.title: Gold rate up amid focus on potential US-Iran peace deal; dimming US Fed rate cut hopes cap gains
india_trends.summary: Gold rate rose on MCX on Thursday morning. The big relief for gold traders is the prospects of a peace deal between the US and Iran, which can lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, a critical waterway for global oil trade.
